outline.headline: Q1 2026 Business Review
outline.message: Board-level review of Q1 consolidated results, two escalation items, and H1 hiring plan approval request.

outline.headline: Agenda
outline.message: Four sections: revenue and margin, APAC segment, operational risks, and hiring plan.

outline.headline: Revenue Hit $29.3M, Up 18% YoY
outline.message: Q1 total revenue of $29.3M exceeded plan by 4% and accelerated growth from 14% in Q4.
evidence_queries: Q1 2026 total revenue figure in dollars
Q1 2026 revenue year-over-year growth rate versus Q1 2025
Q1 2026 revenue versus plan variance percentage
Q4 2025 revenue growth rate for sequential comparison

outline.headline: Gross Margin Expanded 210bps to 64.4%
outline.message: Infrastructure optimizations in NA and EMEA drove margin improvement, partially offset by APAC investment.
evidence_queries: Q1 2026 gross margin percentage
Q4 2025 gross margin for basis point comparison
NA and EMEA infrastructure cost reduction savings Q1 2026
APAC investment spend impact on consolidated gross margin

outline.headline: APAC Is Our Fastest-Growing Segment
outline.message: APAC pipeline grew 31% QoQ for the second consecutive quarter, driven by three new enterprise logos.
evidence_queries: APAC pipeline growth rate Q1 2026 quarter-over-quarter
APAC new enterprise customer logos signed Q1 2026
APAC growth rate compared to NA and EMEA same period
APAC customer acquisition cost trend Q1 2026

outline.headline: Two Risks Require Board Attention
outline.message: Supplier concentration in the data pipeline and rising EMEA CAC are flagged for escalation.
evidence_queries: Data pipeline supplier concentration percentage and vendor contract renewal date
EMEA customer acquisition cost increase over past two months
Proposed mitigation actions for supplier diversification with deadlines
EMEA go-to-market review scope and timeline

outline.headline: H1 Hiring Plan: 18 Roles, $2.4M
outline.message: Engineering, data science, and APAC sales expansions required to sustain growth into H2.
evidence_queries: H1 2026 hiring plan total headcount by department
Engineering headcount requirements and justification H1 2026
APAC sales team expansion plan and cost H1 2026
Total hiring plan cost and budget envelope status

outline.headline: Q1 Strong — Two Actions Needed Now
outline.message: Q1 beat revenue and margin targets; board should approve hiring and mandate supplier review.
